context.decision_reason: Priority tier: features/security. SECURITY_AUDIT found 14 findings (2 critical, 3 high, 5 medium, 4 low). All previous tasks are completed. Critical findings include: (1) hardcoded fallback secret 'changeme-set-L402_SECRET' in L402 middleware allows macaroon forgery and full payment bypass (CWE-798), (2) optional secret field design in L402Config enables accidental deployment without a secret (CWE-330), (3) CASHU_MINT_URL taken without validation creates SSRF vector (CWE-918), (4) unbounded in-memory token registry enables DoS via memory exhaustion (CWE-400), (5) no rate limiting on any endpoint (CWE-307), (6) missing security headers/helmet (CWE-116). These must be fixed before production deployment. Routing to TASK_SYNTHESIZER to create fix tasks from security_audit_output.json findings.
context.what_you_learned: All 6 original feature-build tasks are completed and verified (review_audit gave 100% verification score, build passes, tests pass). SECURITY_AUDIT ran and found 14 real security issues: 2 critical (hardcoded default secret enables full auth bypass; optional secret type enables accidental insecure deployment), 4 high (SSRF via unvalidated mint URL; unbounded in-memory registry DoS; no rate limiting; no security headers), 5 medium (CORS not configured; error message information leakage; incomplete URL normalization for trusted mints; non-persistent token registry replay risk; weak REQUIRED_SATS validation), 3 low. No pending tasks exist in active/. The approaches_tried array incorrectly labels round 7 as 'unproductive' but the actual security_audit_output.json and round_history confirm 14 findings were returned. TASK_SYNTHESIZER must create fix tasks from security_audit_output.json.
